content:
Rewrite resolver from BFS level-based to stream-based architecture.

### Current Architecture (BFS levels)
```
Level 0: fetch metadata for 152 direct deps (parallel)
         wait for ALL to complete
Level 1: fetch metadata for ~400 transitive deps (parallel)
         wait for ALL to complete
...
Level 8-12: last few transitive deps
```
Each level blocks on the slowest fetch in that level.

### Target Architecture (stream-based)
```
For each package resolved:
  spawn async task → fetch metadata → for each dep → spawn task
All tasks run concurrently, bounded by semaphore.
No level barriers.
```
